ssm.maintenancewindowtask.maintenancewin.Docs: Client-specific information to pass to the AWS Lambda function that you're invoking. You can then use the `context` variable to process the client information in your AWS Lambda function.
JSON to provide to your AWS Lambda function as input.  Although `Type` is listed as "String" for this property, the payload content must be formatted as a Base64-encoded binary data object.

An AWS Lambda function version or alias name. If you specify a function version, the action uses the qualified function Amazon Resource Name (ARN) to invoke a specific Lambda function. If you specify an alias name, the action uses the alias ARN to invoke the Lambda function version that the alias points to.
